productName: Diamond Dusted Pre-Roll - Donut Resin DDP - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Donut Resin flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
